+import google.generativeai as genai
+from rasa_sdk import Action, Tracker
+from rasa_sdk.executor import CollectingDispatcher
+from rasa_sdk.events import SlotSet
+import json
+
+# Your Gemini API key
+GEMINI_API_KEY = "AIzaSyDpUTjv1Jfdek0T-YYbNzie3II68wL_tB0"  # ← paste your key here
+
+genai.configure(api_key=GEMINI_API_KEY)
+model = genai.GenerativeModel("gemini-1.5-flash")
+
+class ActionLLMFallback(Action):
+
+    def name(self):
+        return "action_llm_fallback"
+
+    def run(self, dispatcher, tracker, domain):
+        user_message = tracker.latest_message.get("text")
+
+        prompt = f"""
+You are a logistics and fleet management chatbot assistant for a Pakistani transport company.
+The user said: "{user_message}"
+
+Classify this message into exactly one of these intents:
+- greet
+- goodbye
+- track_by_number
+- ask_bus_schedule
+- check_fleet_route
+- ask_order
+- ask_how_to_book_bus
+- ask_pricing
+- ask_support
+
+Important notes:
+- User may write in Roman Urdu, English, or mix of both
+- "isl" means Islamabad, "lhr" means Lahore, "khi" means Karachi
+- "bjy" means Bahawalpur, "mul" means Multan, "pesh" means Peshawar
+- "2" means "to" in Roman Urdu shorthand
+- Reply with ONLY the intent name, nothing else.
+"""
+
+        try:
+            response = model.generate_content(prompt)
+            intent = response.text.strip().lower()
+
+            # Map intent to response
+            intent_responses = {
+                "greet": "Hey! Welcome to our Logistics & Fleet Management System! 🚌📦",
+                "goodbye": "Goodbye! Have a safe journey! 🚌",
+                "check_fleet_route": "Let me check the route for you! Which cities are you traveling between?",
+                "ask_bus_schedule": "I'll check the bus schedule for you! Please tell me source and destination city.",
+                "track_by_number": "Please provide your tracking number and I'll check it right away!",
+                "ask_pricing": "I'll check the price for you! Which route or service are you asking about?",
+                "ask_order": "I'll help you place an order! Please provide pickup and delivery details.",
+                "ask_how_to_book_bus": "I'll guide you on how to book a bus ticket!",
+                "ask_support": "Let me connect you with our support team right away!",
+            }
+
+            reply = intent_responses.get(intent, "Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you rephrase?")
+            dispatcher.utter_message(text=f"🤖 {reply}")
+
+        except Exception as e:
+            dispatcher.utter_message(text="Sorry, I'm having trouble understanding. Please try again!")
+
+        return []
